acceptance_targets: [chapter_11_dialogue_001] In revised versions of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:87, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:137, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:177, a reader can identify Della versus Lucille from diction alone: Della's lines must hinge on concrete material stakes, Lucille's on record or legal stakes, and none of the cited lines may rely on the repeated abstract keyword "curate/curated."

findings.acceptance_test: In revised versions of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:87, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:137, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:177, a reader can identify Della versus Lucille from diction alone: Della's lines must hinge on concrete material stakes, Lucille's on record or legal stakes, and none of the cited lines may rely on the repeated abstract keyword "curate/curated."
findings.problem: Several key lines slip from character-specific speech into polished abstract thesis language. Della's "Spectacle is what rich people call it when poor people notice who ate first" and "The living curate it," plus Lucille's "It was curated," flatten register into authorial rhetoric and make Della and Lucille sound more interchangeable than the style bible allows.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:87, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:137, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:177 so Della speaks through concrete land, labor, body, or household stakes, while Lucille speaks through record, paper, and procedure. Remove the repeated "curate/curated" phrasing in those spans and replace it with period-grounded diction each speaker would plausibly reach for under pressure.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on dialogue realism and voice separation: idiolect fidelity, leverage shifts, pressure cadence, anti-transcript behavior, natural colloquial texture (contractions/interruptions/slang when character-true), and pressure-true profanity usage per aesthetic risk policy.
revision_pass.label: dialogue/idiolect/cadence fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally compromised caretaking, the bureaucratic brutality of naming, and the physical labor of moving the dead. When an edge case appears, prefer the detail a witness would remember over the phrasing a polite narrator would use. Let tenderness exist inside harsh material without cleaning the harshness off.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If childbirth, exhumation, poverty, sexual history, bodily decay, or violence enters a scene, render it through specific sensation and consequence; summarizing away the hard fact counts as a failed pass, not tasteful restraint.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High overall; contractions are the norm across dialogue, with fuller forms reserved for class performance, legal formality, deliberate emphasis, or a character trying not to lose composure.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate public labor chapters with quieter domestic or inventory chapters, vary scene count and dialogue density, let some chapters turn on information or paperwork rather than confrontation, and ensure no two consecutive chapters share the same dominant mechanism, pace, or emotional temperature.
prose_style_profile.diction: Plainspoken historical Appalachian-Southern English without caricature; concrete, unsentimental, regionally grounded, and alert to how legal language clashes with lived speech.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Della Bledsoe, intimate enough to track bodily memory and evasive thought while never slipping into other characters' interior monologue as fact
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate muscular work-sentence compression with longer accumulating sentences that carry memory, atmosphere, and moral weight; let cadence tighten in hearings and exhumations, then widen in domestic or reflective passages.
